description: Attaches an audio or video asset to an expression for synchronized media playback during animation.
utility: Attach audio or video media to an expression for synchronized playback

arguments.name: assetName
arguments.description: Name of the audio/video asset in the lesson's asset library, in quotes

alternates.description: Play audio while pen-tracing the expression

examples.scenario: Write expression with media and custom duration
examples.expression: write_5 = write(at(12,3), "2 hat(i) - hat(j) + 3 hat(k)", media("vector-intro"), t(5))
